title: Planet of Sweets
overview: A queen bee is sick of the sugary treats that are the only food available on her planet.

title: Planet of Canyons
overview: An overly protective mama eagle refuses to let her children fly because the canyon walls are too narrow.

title: Planet of Anthills
overview: Ants mindlessly follow the worker in front of them, with no respite.

title: Planet of Fireflies
overview: A firefly thinks she is all alone because she sees no other lights on her dark world.
